2026-04-03.patch_summary: This patch renames two io_uring APIs to better reflect their functionality: io_buffer_register_bvec() is renamed to io_buffer_register_request(), and io_buffer_unregister_bvec() is renamed to io_buffer_unregister(). The changes are made in preparation for supporting kernel-populated buffers in fuse io-uring, which will require registering bvecs directly. The new names aim to provide a more generic and accurate description of the APIs' purpose.
